PostToolUse.command: FILE=$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("file_path",""))' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILE" ] && bash -n "$FILE" 2>&1 && echo "✅ Shell syntax OK: $FILE" || echo "❌ Shell syntax error in $FILE"

FILE=$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("file_path",""))' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILE" ] && bash -n "$FILE" 2>&1 && echo "✅ Shell syntax OK: $FILE" || echo "❌ Shell syntax error in $FILE"
